changes.description: ISQ OpenInfra Feb 28, 2026 NAV updated: $32.40/share (Series II Transactional NAV $207,006K / 6,389,136 shares). AUM $207.0M. Source: SEC 8-K filed 2026-04-02 (acc 0001213900-26-039308), EX-99.1.
ISQ OpenInfra declared March distribution of $0.3399/share across all classes (Series I & II). Payable May 5, 2026 to holders of record March 31. Source: SEC 8-K filed 2026-04-02.
KKR Infrastructure declared March distribution: Class I $0.3300/share. Payable April 25, 2026 to holders of record March 31. Source: SEC 8-K filed 2026-04-01.
Ares ACI declared quarterly distributions: Class I $0.20830/share gross for April, May, June 2026. Source: SEC 8-K filed 2026-03-23.
Ares ACI subsidiary increased revolving credit facility commitments. Source: SEC 8-K filed 2026-03-31 (Item 2.03).

Ares ACI April 2026 monthly closing: $305.2M aggregate share sales. 119.1M Class I shares outstanding as of March 31, 2026. March NAV expected ~20 business days after April 1. Source: SEC 8-K filed 2026-04-07.
